title: [Apache Flink 1.7.1 Released](</2018/12/21/apache-flink-1.7.1-released/>)
summary:
#  Apache Flink 1.7.1 Released
December 21, 2018 -
The Apache Flink community released the first bugfix version of the Apache Flink 1.7 series.
This release includes 27 fixes and minor improvements for Flink 1.7.0. The list below includes a…
